commands.review_summary:
The PR clears an existing Gmail watcher renewal interval before assigning a new one in `startGmailWatcher`, adds fake-timer regression tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main overwrites the module-scoped `renewInterval` on a second successful `startGmailWatcher` call, leaving the previous interval handle unreachable. I did not execute tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real restart proof and normal merge readiness, not an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(hooks): clear Gmail watcher renewal interval on re-entry
